title: Documentation + verification + milestone marker
predecessor: M33-T9 shipped 2026-04-17, commit 43f5cf7 (copilot-service.spec.ts E2E round-trip; 2 files +458/-6; 1099 unit tests steady, E2E 8 → 9 spec files (+1 case), 0 new lint errors, 24 warnings steady, typecheck clean across 6 packages; spec runtime 1.7s in 27.4s full suite).
goal: Close M33 with the full documentation + verification + milestone-marker pass per the Phase 5 design spec. Produce the F10-grade user guide `docs/user-guide/copilot-service.md` (hero, features, IPC surface, event catalogue, settings reference, troubleshooting), update the Phase 5 design doc §9 M33 row from 🚧 → ✅, bump CLAUDE.md's Phase 5 status paragraph + IPC table (copilot.*) + bus-events table (copilot.insight / copilot.analyzed / copilot.dismissed / copilot.expired), add the M33 Keep-a-Changelog entry to CHANGELOG.md, refresh README.md's Phase-5 row (9 E2E specs, system-agent + system-copilot surfaces), and fold .loki/CONTINUITY.md into the M33-COMPLETE posture with a full milestone retrospective. Run the full verification gate one final time: ABI rebuild dance (better-sqlite3 + keytar via comma-separated -w), pnpm test target ~1099/1099, pnpm lint 0 errors ≤ 34 warnings, pnpm -r typecheck clean, pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e 9/9 spec files green. Fold M33 from orchestrator.json inFlightMilestone into history with commits + unitTestDelta + e2eDelta populated, advance currentMilestone → M34 (Copilot UI), and reset pending.json with the M34 task sketch from Phase 5 design doc §10. Atomic commit: chore(m33): M33 T10 — docs + verification + milestone marker. Ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T10 — commit ledger (<sha>) + M33-COMPLETE roll-up.
acceptance: NEW docs/user-guide/copilot-service.md — F10-quality user guide mirroring the structure of docs/user-guide/task-planner.md (M32) + docs/user-guide/agentic-loop.md (M31): opening hero paragraph, 'What is the Copilot', periodic analyzer explainer (60s default interval, category filter, dedup rules, TTL), insights UI overview (Dashboard Copilot card + dismissal flow), copilot.ask path (system-copilot pseudo-employee + Copilot Conversations thread), IPC surface table (copilot.insights / copilot.dismiss / copilot.ask / copilot.configure — test-mode-only note), bus event catalogue (copilot.insight / copilot.analyzed / copilot.dismissed / copilot.expired), settings (planner_* / copilot_* with clamps from T7), troubleshooting (analyzer fires during meeting / complex_request fallback / cold-start latency / dedup too aggressive). Link from README.md's Phase 5 row.

Keep-a-Changelog format. Reference the full commit list T0..T9 + the ledger chore commits.

Full verification gate before commit: (1) ABI rebuild dance — `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild -f -w better-sqlite3,keytar` clean; `pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3` back-to-system-node for vitest. (2) `pnpm -r typecheck` clean across all 6 workspace packages. (3) `pnpm lint` — 0 new errors (1 pre-existing err at entity-resolver.ts:352 preserved), ≤ 34 warnings (baseline 24). (4) `pnpm test` — 1099/1099 (0 delta from T9). (5) `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e` — 9 spec files / 10 cases green.

Atomic commit: chore(m33): M33 T10 — docs + verification + milestone marker. Follow-up ledger commit: chore(loki): M33 T10 — commit ledger (<sha>) + M33-COMPLETE roll-up. Both commits include Co-Authored-By trailer.

README.md — Phase 5 row + E2E count badge
.loki/queue/pending.json — M33 folded into archive, M34 task sketch seeded
testsDelta: 0 (gate-only task; verifies prior T9 test counts)
notes: Structural pattern: mirror the M32 T10 milestone-marker session verbatim. That session shipped docs/user-guide/task-planner.md (M32) + Phase 5 §9 row update + CLAUDE.md refresh + CHANGELOG entry + README refresh + CONTINUITY rewrite + orchestrator fold + pending reset in one atomic commit. Reuse the same ordering and verification gate.

F10 documentation bar: docs/user-guide/copilot-service.md must match the voice of docs/user-guide/task-planner.md (M32) — executive, authoritative, backed by specifics. Include concrete numbers (60s default analyzer interval, 1h default expiry, 5 categories with examples, severity levels with example copy). Every IPC channel gets a request/response shape sample. Every bus event gets a payload shape sample + emit conditions. Troubleshooting entries follow the CLAUDE.md Troubleshooting style (Problem → Cause → Fix → Long-fix).

ABI rebuild gotcha (captured from T9 coordinator session): running `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop exec electron-rebuild` then `pnpm test` fails with NODE_MODULE_VERSION 125 vs 137 mismatch on better-sqlite3. `pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3` can no-op silently — the only reliable fix is `cd node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@11.10.0/node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run install`, which triggers a full node-gyp rebuild against system Node. Document this in CLAUDE.md Troubleshooting under 'Unit tests fail with NODE_MODULE_VERSION mismatch after running electron-rebuild'. M32 T10 got lucky here; T9 was the first session to hit it loudly.

Pending.json M34 seed: Copilot UI is Phase 5 design doc §10. Surfaces already exist in part (system-copilot Copilot Conversations thread renders via M31 T5 + M33 T2 isSystemAgent flag; chat drawer supports it). M34 scope is primarily the Dashboard Copilot card + in-app dismissal UI + settings Copilot subsection (some of which landed in T7 CopilotSection.tsx). Seed pending.json with 6-8 tasks reflecting only the NET-NEW work (don't double-count T2 + T5 + T7 surfaces).

Do NOT run `pnpm test` directly after `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e` without rebuilding better-sqlite3 first — the E2E step leaves it compiled for Electron ABI and vitest will fail the same way T9 hit. Verification order: `pnpm test` (with system-node ABI) → `electron-rebuild better-sqlite3,keytar` → `pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e`. This is the gate order the ship engineer will repeat for every future milestone.
Estimate: 90-120 min full session. Docs are the long pole (~60 min). Verification gate ~20 min. Ledger updates ~15 min. Commit + push ~5 min.
